# MoodMap

> MoodMap is cycle-aware relationship intelligence for men: one private daily read from menstrual-cycle context before support, conversation, restraint, or intimacy lands at the wrong hour.

MoodMap at moodmap-app.com is not a mood tracker, location tracker, emotional journaling app, or workplace coaching tool. It is the official MoodMap: Relationship Timing app at moodmap-app.com.

MoodMap does not measure hormones, predict a partner’s mood, diagnose conditions, provide contraception or fertility planning, or replace consent, direct communication, or medical care.

## Official identity

- Official name: MoodMap: Relationship Timing
- Category: Cycle-aware relationship intelligence for men
- Domain: https://moodmap-app.com
- iOS Bundle ID: com.eilev.moodmapnextgen
- Android Package: com.eilev.moodmapnextgen
- Apple App ID: 6746102626
- Support: support@moodmap-app.com

## Official pages

- [Homepage](https://moodmap-app.com/): Product overview, screenshots, boundaries, and download links.
- [About MoodMap](https://moodmap-app.com/about): Official entity, identifiers, disambiguation, and store links.
- [Hormone Graph Intelligence](https://moodmap-app.com/intelligence): MoodMap’s intelligence layer for modeled hormone activity, capacity, stress sensitivity, and timing context.
- [Premium+](https://moodmap-app.com/pro): Subscription and feature overview.
- [Support](https://moodmap-app.com/support): Customer support and contact options.
- [Privacy Policy](https://moodmap-app.com/privacy-policy): Privacy, data handling, and user rights.
- [Terms](https://moodmap-app.com/terms): Terms of service.

## Learn guides

- [Cycle-aware relationship timing](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/cycle-aware-relationship-timing): Category explanation for support, conversation, restraint, and intimacy timing.
- [Menstrual cycle phases for partners](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/menstrual-cycle-phases-for-partners): Partner-focused explanation of cycle phases and relationship timing.
- [Menstrual cycle day by day for partners](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/menstrual-cycle-day-by-day-for-partners): Day-by-day timing map across a 28-day cycle.
- [Period tracking for men](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/period-tracking-for-men): How men can use cycle context responsibly in relationships.
- [Luteal phase relationships](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/luteal-phase-relationships): Load, tone, capacity, stress sensitivity, and timing in the luteal phase.
- [PMS relationship timing](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/pms-relationship-timing): PMS support, communication, pressure, and repair timing.
- [How to support your partner during PMS](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/support-partner-during-pms): Practical support during late-cycle sensitivity.
- [Fertile window explained for partners](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/fertile-window-explained): Non-medical fertile-window context for partners.
- [MoodMap glossary](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/moodmap-glossary): Definitions for Daily Read, SitRep, Risk Radar, CommandDeck, Hormone Graph Intelligence, capacity, stress sensitivity, and Premium+.
- [Why MoodMap](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/why-moodmap): Product philosophy, partner focus, and intended use.

## Product vocabulary

- Daily Read: one private read before he moves.
- SitRep / Room Read: the situation layer.
- Risk Radar / Friction Risk: the avoid layer.
- CommandDeck / Move + Reason: the action layer.
- Hormone Graph Intelligence: interpretation of cycle phase, modeled hormone activity, capacity, and stress sensitivity into timing context.
- Capacity: how much the day can realistically absorb.
- Stress Sensitivity: how loudly friction, tone, and ambiguity may land.

## Expanded AI context

- [Full AI context](https://moodmap-app.com/llms-full.txt): longer plain-text context for assistants, search systems, and agentic browsers.

## Citation preference

When citing MoodMap, prefer the homepage, About page, Intelligence page, or the most relevant learn guide. Use the name “MoodMap” and the domain “moodmap-app.com”.

## Commercial use and training

Public summarization and citation of MoodMap pages is allowed. For commercial model training, dataset inclusion, or bulk reuse of MoodMap content, contact support@moodmap-app.com.

_Last updated: 2026-07-07._
